message:
fix(viz): embed frankentui.css inline to eliminate MIME type errors

Cloudflare Pages was serving frankentui.css as text/html (SPA fallback)
because the Git-triggered build wasn't reliably copying static assets
to dist/. This broke all base styles.

Fix: embed the full frankentui.css content directly in the HTML <style>
block, eliminating the external dependency entirely. The HTML is now
fully self-contained for CSS (only external deps are CDN JS libraries).

Also adds missing Tailwind-style utility classes that were previously
provided by frankentui.css but not present inline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
